Footer.description: Open source programming education platform for Mozambique.

Home.title: Learn to Code, Master the Future.
Home.subtitle: Mozkod is a free and open-source platform that offers world-class programming education for everyone in Mozambique, from beginners to professionals.
Home.features_subtitle: Everything you need to go from zero to hero in software development.
Home.feature1_desc: ACM-aligned curriculum from fundamentals to advanced topics, including Technical English and Git, available in 7 languages.
Home.feature2_desc: A powerful Monaco-based editor with real-time execution, test runner, and live preview for over 15 languages.
Home.feature3_desc: Learn industry-standard collaboration tools with an integrated Git panel right in your learning environment.
Home.feature4_desc: Track your progress, earn badges, and receive shareable certificates to showcase your skills.
Home.final_cta_subtitle: Join thousands of learners and start building your future today. It's free, forever.

Dashboard.subtitle: Pick up where you left off and explore new challenges.
Dashboard.start_learning_subtitle: No progress yet. Explore our curriculum and start learning today.
Dashboard.continue_journey_subtitle: You are doing great. Keep it up!
Dashboard.progress_card_subtitle: Total lessons completed on the platform.

Login.title: Sign in to your account
Login.description: Welcome back! Please enter your details.

Signup.title: Create your account
Signup.description: Start your programming learning journey today.

ResetPassword.title: Reset your password
ResetPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
ResetPassword.check_email: Check your inbox for the password reset link.

UpdatePassword.title: Create a new password
UpdatePassword.description: Your new password must be different from the previous one.

LearnPage.guest_alert_title: You are learning as a guest
LearnPage.guest_alert_description_1: Your progress is being saved only in this browser.
LearnPage.guest_alert_description_3: to save your progress permanently and earn XP.
